footer.tagline: Free, ATS-friendly resumes. Build, share by link, and export to PDF or DOCX in minutes.

home.lead: Build an ATS-friendly CV that still looks designed. Edit your draft once, switch templates freely, then download the exact file format you need.

workflow.title: Pick the structure
workflow.description: Start from ATS-safe templates with real layout differences, not just color swaps.

workflow.title: Edit once
workflow.description: Your sections, ordering, accent color and typography stay reusable across designs.

workflow.title: Export directly
workflow.description: Download PDF, DOCX or ZIP from the editor without waiting on a background queue.

home.exportsTitle: A resume builder that respects the file at the end.
home.exportsLead: The editor is useful only if the final download is reliable. CVMaker keeps export formats visible, direct and consistent with the preview.

trust.title: ATS first
trust.description: Every export keeps the resume as selectable text with predictable section hierarchy.

trust.title: Shareable links
trust.description: Publish a public CV page with navigation, downloads and a fast reader-friendly preview.

trust.title: Private drafts
trust.description: Your working drafts stay behind your account until you explicitly publish them.

home.rangeLead: Conservative, technical, executive and editorial layouts share one draft model.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you’re looking for doesn’t exist or may have moved.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: An unexpected error interrupted this page. Try again — if it keeps happening, head back and start fresh.

global.title: Something went wrong
global.description: A critical error stopped the app from loading. Please reload the page to continue.

auth.notFoundDescription: That authentication page doesn’t exist. Sign in or create your account to continue.
auth.errorDescription: We couldn’t complete that request. Please try again.

dashboard.notFoundDescription: This dashboard page doesn’t exist. Pick a section from the menu, or return to your dashboard.
dashboard.errorDescription: Something went wrong while loading your account. Try again in a moment.

editor.notFoundDescription: This resume doesn’t exist, or you no longer have access to it.
editor.errorDescription: Reload the editor to continue — your saved changes are safe.
